note: Expected verdicts for the agent-loop demo regression (P4-T7 / PRD §14.1 week-12 kill criterion). RS-LOCK-001 is a WARN by design (a rewrite is an availability problem, not data corruption); the demo gates it with --warn-fail so the naive migration exits non-zero. The rewrite reaches PASS. See demo/README.md. Assertions are deterministic via --seed 1 (INV-DETERMINISM).
